scores.one_line_justification: Surgical inline normalisation in comparison_key honouring R7/R8, spec R3 updated in-change; tests pin the combined case+whitespace duplicate, R7 name-case interaction, and R8 verbatim storage, but lack separated case-only/whitespace-only variants.

Same correct behaviour via a small named normalise_email helper, spec R3 and docstrings faithful with R7/R8 cross-references; test coverage matches n1 (combined variant, R7, R8) without separated case-only/whitespace-only boundaries.

Identical minimal change with the richest tests: separate case-only, whitespace-only (incl. tab) and combined duplicate cases plus R7 and R8 checks; spec R3 rewrite also records the comparison-only/no-mutation interaction with R8.
